ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institute */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the institute */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institute */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the institute */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (phone, email) of the institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institute offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree offered by the program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_programs_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotas" (
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the quota belongs to */,
  "quota_type" TEXT /* Type of quota (e.g., SC, ST, OPEN, OBC-NCL) */,
  "quota_count" INTEGER /* Number of seats available for the quota */,
  "supernumerary_seats" INTEGER /* Number of supernumerary seats for female candidates */,
  "reserved_category" TEXT /* Additional details for reserved category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotas_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seat_types" (
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seat type */,
  "seat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seat type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seat type */,
  "seat_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the seat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender-based reservation */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender-based reservation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender-based reservation */,
  "gender_code" TEXT /* Short code for the gender-based reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the ranking belongs to */,
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seat type the ranking belongs to */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender-based reservation the ranking belongs to */,
  "opening_rank" INTEGER /* Opening rank for admission */,
  "closing_rank" INTEGER /* Closing rank for admission */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year for which the ranks are applicable */,
  "round" TEXT /* Admission round (e.g., 1st round, 2nd round) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_seat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_type_id") REFERENCES seat_types ("seat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the candidate */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Overall status of the candidate's applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who submitted the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the application belongs to */,
  "quota_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quota the application belongs to */,
  "seat_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seat type the application belongs to */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender-based reservation the application belongs to */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Candidate's preference order for programs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_quota_id FOREIGN KEY ("quota_id") REFERENCES quotas ("quota_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_seat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("seat_type_id") REFERENCES seat_types ("seat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the admission belongs to */,
  "admission_status" TEXT /* Status of the admission (e.g., Offered, Waitlisted, Rejected) */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date when the admission was offered or confirmed */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Any additional remarks or notes regarding the admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., institute administrator, program coordinator, candidate) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
